full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Checking if the selected papers satisfy Part A rules
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: I shared two papers. Can you verify which one satisfies the Part A requirements such as venue, year, and method?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped confirm that the NeurIPS paper 'Learning Kernels with Radiuses of Minimum Enclosing Balls' satisfies the exam constraints.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I checked the paper and confirmed that it is from NeurIPS 2010 and focuses on SVM kernel learning.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding the main contribution of the paper
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What is the main idea of the paper Learning Kernels with Radiuses of Minimum Enclosing Balls?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided a simple explanation of how the paper improves kernel learning using the margin and radius formulation.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I confirmed this idea by reading the introduction and methodology sections of the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Can this paper be reproduced on a CPU with small datasets?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed that SVM kernel learning experiments can be reproduced using smaller datasets.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I verified that SVM implementations exist in standard libraries such as scikit-learn.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Check if this paper already appears in the response sheet list.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped verify that the selected paper does not appear in the response sheet.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I manually scanned the response sheet and confirmed the title is not listed.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Generate the required JSON structure for Part A LLM usage disclosure.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped produce the correctly structured JSON file required for submission.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I checked that the structure matches the required format in the exam instructions.
